pi_items.source: Cross-referenced across task.json metadata, setup_task.sh (creates directory at line 15), export_result.sh (line 8), and verifier.py (line 147)
Task description specifies this path; setup_task.sh creates directory at line 12 and populates with city images at lines 28-46
Task description lists these four cities explicitly (Slide 1-4); setup_task.sh creates new_york.jpg, paris.jpg, tokyo.jpg, london.jpg; verifier.py line 148 uses exact list
Task description states 'Create 4 slides using the images provided'; verifier.py line 203 checks 'if info["slide_count"] == 4'

Metadata claims min_font_size of 24, but: (1) task.json description says 'large, visible text overlay' without specifying 24pt, (2) setup_task.sh uses -pointsize 100 for generated images (lines 29, 35, 40, 45), (3) verifier.py contains NO font size validation anywhere in parse_odp_xml or verify_vertical_signage functions

Task description states 'Set all slides to **advance automatically after 3 seconds**', but verifier.py line 119 retrieves duration attribute without validating its value; line 120-124 only checks if transition-type='automatic', NOT the specific duration

setup_task.sh lines 26-53 generate city images using 'convert' command (ImageMagick); images are 1920x1080 colored backgrounds with text annotations; not downloaded from external URL or real data source
task.json id field matches task directory name and verifier success spec program reference
task.json env_id field; consistent with environment directory name and expected environment version
task.json difficulty field
task.json init.timeout_sec field
task.json init.max_steps field
task.json init.reward_type field

pi_items.verified_value: LibreOffice Impress - Open-source presentation software by The Document Foundation
pi_items.source: install_impress.sh installs 'libreoffice-impress' package; extensively documented at libreoffice.org
Task requires .odp extension; verifier.py uses zipfile to parse ODP XML structure (lines 46-140); odfpy library installed in install_impress.sh
task.json success.spec.program: 'verifier.py::verify_vertical_signage'; function defined at line 141 of verifier.py
verifier.py parse_odp_xml returns info['valid']=True only if XML parsing succeeds

pi_items.metadata_value: Slide orientation must be Portrait (height > width)
pi_items.source: verifier.py line 78 checks 'if h > w: info[orientation]=portrait'
verifier.py line 98 counts draw:page elements and checks equality to 4

pi_items.metadata_value: All 4 city names must be found in presentation text
pi_items.source: verifier.py lines 198-201 iterate through required_cities list and search for each in concatenated text_content
verifier.py line 112 counts draw:image elements; awards points based on count

pi_items.metadata_value: Slides must be set to auto-advance
pi_items.source: verifier.py lines 116-124 count slides with presentation:transition-type='automatic'

pi_items.metadata_value: Presentation must be set to loop endlessly
pi_items.source: verifier.py lines 128-132 check presentation:settings presentation:endless='true'

pi_items.verified_value: Pass: score >= 75 AND orientation == 'portrait' AND auto_advance == True (verifier.py line 239)
pi_items.source: verifier.py line 239 defines pass condition; maximum achievable score is 100 (10+20+10+10+20+15+15)

pi_items.verified_value: Images are 1920x1080 landscape (not vertical despite task requirement for vertical presentation)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 28-46 use 'convert -size 1920x1080' for all four city images; comment at line 24 explicitly states 'We provide standard landscape images so the agent has to fit them to vertical slides'

pi_items.metadata_value: If ImageMagick not available, dummy files created
pi_items.verified_value: True - setup_task.sh lines 47-52 create empty dummy files if 'convert' command not found
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 26 checks 'if command -v convert', lines 47-52 handle fallback case

privileged_info_summary: The task 'create_vertical_digital_signage@1' requires creating a portrait-oriented 4-slide presentation using LibreOffice Impress (ODP format). All core metadata claims are verified: output path is /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/vertical_signage.odp, asset directory is /home/ga/Documents/Assets/Cities, required cities are [New York, Paris, Tokyo, London], and slide count is 4. The presentation data is fully synthetic, generated during task setup using ImageMagick (creating 1920x1080 landscape images that agents must adapt to portrait orientation). The verifier correctly implements seven validation criteria: (1) valid ODP file, (2) portrait orientation, (3) exactly 4 slides, (4) all 4 city names present, (5) at least 4 images, (6) auto-advance enabled, (7) endless loop enabled. Pass threshold requires score >= 75 with mandatory portrait orientation and auto-advance. One metadata claim is unverified: 'min_font_size': 24 appears in metadata but is neither specified in task description nor validated by the verifier, making its source and intended use unclear.
